title: NTV Interviews
wikitext:
[]: NTV Interviews?             Quote Post by Clover » Sun Nov 13, 2011 2:46 am I have a set of 9 videos of these people sitting and talking about eva. What exactly is this? Has anyone seen it before or translated the responses of the eva cast? http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1tzdVlVyXhk Here's one I re-uploaded.

[]:             Quote Post by symbv » Sun Nov 13, 2011 8:45 am Seems to be from some TV program around 2007 (as the MC read some letter which mentioned about watching Eva 10 years ago). Of the guests shown, there was Miyamura (who voiced Asuka) and Ootsuki (who are in the production team), the others are not related to Eva.

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Sun Nov 13, 2011 6:27 pm Appears to be the same program as this clip: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=W3uyWaQOFoQ
